product_overview: Zenith Retail Cloud is a vendor-facing point-of-sale and operations dashboard for managing sign-in, walk-in orders, order lifecycles, live queue activity, inventory, and daily performance from one place. Vendors can also open or close their stall, monitor current operations, and maintain their menu.
core_goals: Sign in to access the vendor dashboard
Create walk-in orders from the live menu
Manage order status through the fulfillment lifecycle
Monitor the live pickup queue and daily business performance
Add, edit, delete, and update menu item availability
Open or close the stall to control whether new orders are accepted

features.name: Vendor Login
features.description: Approved vendors sign in with phone number and password to access the dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill the phone input -> Fill the password input -> Submit the sign-in form -> See the dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Enter incorrect credentials -> Submit the sign-in form -> See an error message on the login screen

features.name: Vendor Apply (self-onboarding)
features.description: New vendors can submit an application to request access before being approved by an admin.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Switch to the vendor application flow -> Fill the stall name -> Fill the phone number -> Fill the password -> Submit the application -> See confirmation that the application was received and is awaiting approval

features.name: Logout
features.description: Signed-in vendors can end their session and return to the login screen from any protected view.
user_flows: Open a protected view -> Sign out from the account menu -> Return to /login

features.name: Dashboard Analytics
features.description: Vendors can view daily business performance, live queue activity, and recent transactions on the dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to #/dashboard -> View today's revenue and order count -> Review the hourly orders chart -> Review the live queue panel -> Review the recent transactions list

features.name: Point of Sale (walk-in order)
features.description: Vendors can build a counter order from the live menu, choose a payment method, and charge the order.
user_flows: Navigate to #/pos -> Browse the product grid -> Filter items by category -> Add products to the cart -> Adjust item quantities in the cart -> Choose cash or UPI payment -> Charge the order
Navigate to #/pos -> Add items to the cart -> Clear the cart -> See the cart reset to empty

features.name: Orders Board & Lifecycle
features.description: Vendors can track orders and move them through the order lifecycle using board actions and pagination.
user_flows: Navigate to #/orders -> Switch between All Orders, Active, and Completed tabs -> Move through the order list with Prev and Next -> Confirm an offline payment when applicable -> Mark an order ready -> Mark the order picked up -> Complete the order
Navigate to #/orders -> Open an order action -> Choose to reject the order -> Confirm the rejection -> See the order move to the rejected state

features.name: Live Queue
features.description: Vendors can open the queue view to monitor orders waiting for pickup in real time.
user_flows: Navigate to #/queue -> View the live pickup queue -> Observe queued orders update on the screen
Navigate to #/queue -> View the empty-state message when no orders are waiting

features.name: Inventory Management
features.description: Vendors can maintain menu items by adding, editing, deleting, filtering, and changing availability.
user_flows: Navigate to #/inventory -> Review the menu item list -> Add a new item with name, price, prep time, and availability -> See the new item appear in the inventory list
Navigate to #/inventory -> Select an existing item -> Edit its details -> Save the changes -> See the updated item in the list
Navigate to #/inventory -> Select an item -> Delete the item -> See the item removed from the list
Navigate to #/inventory -> Toggle an item's availability -> See the item switch between available and sold-out
Navigate to #/inventory -> Filter items by category -> See only matching menu items

features.name: Register Open/Close Toggle
features.description: Vendors can control whether the stall accepts new orders by toggling the register state from the header.
user_flows: Navigate to #/dashboard -> Toggle the register open state in the header -> See the stall switch between accepting and not accepting orders

tech_stack: dc-runtime.js (compiled design-tool runtime that drives the inline dashboard in index.html via {{ }} bindings and sc-if / sc-for directives)
Custom fetch-based API layer (src/api) exposed globally as window.ZenithAPI, with token refresh interceptor and integer-paise money formatting

routes.description: Vendor auth gate (React). Renders before the dashboard boots. Tabs between "Vendor sign in" (phone + password) and "Apply as a vendor" (stall name + phone + password, awaits admin approval).
Operations dashboard. Greeting/date, revenue + orders-today KPIs, hourly CSS bar chart, Live Queue panel, Recent Transactions. Backed by GET /vendor/analytics and GET /queue.

Point of Sale. Live product grid from the menu, category chips (All/Breakfast/Mains/Beverages/Sweets), cart with qty steppers, Cash/UPI payment toggle, and a Charge button that places a walk-in order.
Orders board with All/Active/Completed tabs and cursor pagination (Prev/Next). Per-order lifecycle actions — Take Cash (confirm offline), Mark Ready, Picked Up, Complete, Reject.
Live pickup queue for the vendor, backed by GET /queue.
Menu/inventory management. Lists items, Add/Edit/Delete, availability (sold-out) toggle, and a client-side Category column/filter.
Reports view. Cosmetic only — no backend wiring (ratings/reviews are post-MVP).

features.name: Vendor Login
features.description: Approved/active vendors sign in with phone and password to receive access + refresh tokens; session is gated before the dashboard boots.
user_interactions: Fill the Phone input
Fill the Password input
Click "Sign in" to submit
See a friendly error on wrong credentials, inactive account (409), or rate limiting

features.name: Vendor Apply (self-onboarding)
features.description: A new stall submits an application (name, phone, password); a pending vendor is created and must be approved by an admin before login works.
user_interactions: Click "Apply as a vendor"
Fill Stall name, Phone, Password
Click "Submit application"
See the "Application received / awaiting approval" confirmation

features.name: Logout
features.description: Sign out from the avatar in the header on any view; best-effort server revoke then local session clear, returning to the login screen.
user_interactions: Click the avatar (top-right) to sign out
Get returned to the vendor sign-in screen

features.name: Dashboard Analytics
features.description: Daily revenue and order counts, hourly bar chart, live queue panel, and recent transactions for the signed-in vendor.
user_interactions: Land on the dashboard after login
View revenue (formatted from integer paise) and orders-today KPIs
View the hourly chart, live queue, and recent transactions

features.name: Point of Sale (walk-in order)
features.description: Build a counter order from the live menu, filter by category chip, set quantities, pick Cash or UPI, and charge — placing a vendor walk-in order.
user_interactions: Click product cards to add items to the cart
Filter the grid with category chips (All/Breakfast/Mains/Beverages/Sweets)
Increment/decrement line quantities or clear the cart
Toggle Cash vs UPI payment
Click "Charge" to submit the order

features.name: Orders Board & Lifecycle
features.description: Vendor order board with All/Active/Completed tabs and cursor pagination; advance each order through its lifecycle (take cash, mark ready, picked up, complete, reject).
user_interactions: Switch between All Orders / Active / Completed tabs
Page through orders with Prev/Next
Click "Take Cash" to confirm an offline payment
Click "Mark Ready", "Picked Up", and "Complete" to advance an order
Click "Reject" (with confirm/cancel) to reject an order

features.name: Live Queue
features.description: Real-time pickup queue for the vendor; empty-state message when no one is waiting.
user_interactions: Open the Queue view
See queued orders update live (or an empty-state message)

features.name: Inventory Management
features.description: Manage the vendor menu — create, edit, delete items, toggle availability (sold-out), and categorize them (category stored client-side in localStorage until the backend field ships).
user_interactions: View all menu items with price and category
Add a new item (name, price, prep minutes, availability)
Edit an existing item
Delete an item
Toggle an item's availability / sold-out state
Filter by category

features.name: Register Open/Close Toggle
features.description: Header pill that opens or closes the stall by flipping whether the vendor is accepting orders.
user_interactions: Click the register/open pill in the header
See the stall switch between accepting and not accepting orders

known_limitations.issue: POS "Charge" (walk-in counter order) endpoint is not yet implemented in the backend
known_limitations.impact: Charging a walk-in order will fail until the backend endpoint ships, even though the frontend is fully wired to the contract.

known_limitations.issue: Vendor "all items" inventory list endpoint not built; falls back to the customer-facing available-only menu
known_limitations.location: src/api/endpoints.ts (getVendorMenu -> GET /vendors/me/menu, falls back to /menu); spec in docs/INVENTORY_LIST_BACKEND_PROMPT.md
known_limitations.impact: Marking an item sold-out temporarily hides it from inventory (it disappears from the list) until the dedicated endpoint exists.

known_limitations.issue: Menu items have no category field in the backend (unknown fields are rejected)
known_limitations.location: index.html / localStorage key zenith.menuCat; spec in docs/MENU_CATEGORY_BACKEND_PROMPT.md
known_limitations.impact: Categories (POS chips + Inventory column/filter) are stored client-side per-device and are not persisted server-side or shared across devices.
Only offline/cash and vendor-UPI confirmation work; in-app online payment is unavailable.
No backend data; ratings/reviews are post-MVP.

known_limitations.issue: Several dashboard and inventory metrics are static/cosmetic
known_limitations.impact: Inventory stock KPIs (no stock concept in the backend) and dashboard Avg-Handle-Time, Completion-Rate, Week/Month toggles, Export, Pause, and Announce are not backed by live data.

known_limitations.issue: Order rows carry no customer name or line items by design (privacy)
known_limitations.impact: The board lists only orderNumber/total/status/channel; per-order item detail requires GET /orders/{id}.
